\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/calculate\_discharge\_from\_lisflood.py} & Calculate discharge and water depth at specific points from LISFLOOD output files \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/extract\_pfaffenthal\_discharge.py} & Extract pfaffenthal discharge \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/generate\_lisflood\_hydrographs.py} & LISFLOOD Hydrograph Comparison Script Clean and minimal implementation \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/lisflood\_domain\_map\_small.py} & Lisflood domain map small \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/lisflood\_domain\_map\_with\_rivers\_and\_wrf\_grid.py} & Lisflood domain map with rivers and wrf grid \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/plot\_flood\_maps.py} & Flood-depth comparison maps for the WRF-vs-AI -> LISFLOOD-FP paper \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/plot\_minimal\_basin\_map.py} & Standalone Map Generator for Presentation (Minimalist Design) \\
\texttt{03\_flood\_simulation/02\_postprocessing/process\_lisflood\_output.py} & Process LISFLOOD output: 1 \\
\midrule
\end{longtable}}
